title: Hardened Advancements
body:
Is Minecraft's own advancements not enough for you? Well this datapack got you covered.

Hardened Advancements is an advancement datapack that adds new advancements into your world.

Advancements

Some advancements require you to do basic things such as looking at mobs, collecting an item, or eating a piece of food. But there are a few challenging ones that will require you to put in a lot of effort to earn it.

Categories

There are different types of advancements, which can fall unto these catergories: Event, Item, Statistic, Creative, Mob, Bedrock, & Trophy. These determine whenever the main objective of the advancement requires something. Some Bedrock/Legacy achievements are also included!

Trophies

Getting every advancements will reward you a trophy so you can flex against your friends that you done the impossible. Will you challenge yourself to get every advancement?

Total Advancements: 124

- This advancement datapack does not gives rewards upon completion -
